focus: Card Cosmetics — Battle Boards + Music + Victory/Defeat Screens + Damage Numbers & Reticles

items.name: Bridge Command
items.description: Classic starship bridge command deck backdrop. Consoles idle blue, stars visible through the forward window.
items.flavor_text: Same bridge the pilot earned their stripes on. Different captain, same view.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, starship bridge command deck with idle blue consoles and forward viewport stars, classic sci-fi

items.name: Hangar Bay
items.description: Fighter hangar bay backdrop with parked ships and overhead gantry lights. Faint hum in the ambient layer.
items.flavor_text: Smells like jet fuel and rust, even in a memory. The board inherits that.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, fighter hangar bay with parked ships and gantry lights overhead, industrial working-class sci-fi

items.name: Orbital Dock
items.description: Outer-dock view with a moored cruiser, cargo arms extended, planet arc visible in the lower frame.
items.flavor_text: A dock with a view. The cruiser leaves in twenty minutes, regardless of the card.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, orbital dock with moored cruiser cargo arms and planet arc in lower frame, industrial orbit

items.name: Deep Void
items.description: Empty deep-void backdrop with only distant stars and a faint horizon glow. Minimal, meditative.
items.flavor_text: Nothing out here. That is exactly what the pilot came for. Paid for silence.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, empty deep void with distant stars and faint horizon glow, minimal meditative dark space

items.name: Asteroid Belt
items.description: Wide asteroid-belt view with slowly drifting rocks on two axes. Sun backlight from frame right.
items.flavor_text: The rocks do not move quickly. They do not need to. They are already there.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, wide asteroid belt with slowly drifting rocks on two axes, sun backlight from right, animated

items.name: Warp Gate Interior
items.description: Warp-gate interior view with tunnel streaks passing outward. Subtle chromatic aberration at the frame edge.
items.flavor_text: Paused mid-warp, waiting for the card. The tunnel is patient. The pilot is not.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, warp gate tunnel interior with streak lines passing outward and chromatic aberration edge, animated

items.name: Frozen Moon Drydock
items.description: Frozen-surface moon drydock with floodlit hull repair gantries and a pale starfield overhead.
items.flavor_text: Cold enough to weld steel bare-handed and regret it. Still a fine view.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, frozen moon surface drydock with floodlit repair gantries and pale starfield, industrial ice

items.name: Ancient Station
items.description: Pre-voidexa relic station interior with alien glyphs on the bulkheads and slow dust motes in the lights.
items.flavor_text: The station is older than every family crest. The card outlives it anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, pre-voidexa relic station interior with alien glyph bulkheads and slow dust motes, archaeological warm

items.name: Nebula Core
items.description: Inside the bright core of a pink-cyan nebula, with drifting gas tendrils and backlit young stars.
items.flavor_text: A nebula core is not safe. The pilot is here. The cards agreed.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, bright nebula core interior with drifting pink cyan gas tendrils and backlit young stars, cosmic animated

items.name: Crystal Cavern
items.description: Interior of a faceted crystal cavern with refracted light bouncing off every surface. Small glints animate.
items.flavor_text: Light gets lost in here and asks permission to leave. The pilot allows it.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, faceted crystal cavern interior with refracted light bouncing and small animated glints, gemstone rare

items.name: Abandoned Fleet
items.description: Ghost fleet of drifting derelicts, hull lights dead, slow rotation against a dim starfield.
items.flavor_text: Every hull in frame carried somebody once. The card asks them to wait.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, ghost fleet of drifting derelicts hull lights dead slow rotation against dim starfield, haunting

items.name: Obsidian Observatory
items.description: Domed observatory made of volcanic glass with a clear view of a quadruple-star system overhead.
items.flavor_text: Built for watching. The stars finally found something looking back, and paused.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, domed obsidian observatory interior with clear overhead view of quadruple star system, scholarly epic

items.name: Ruined Cathedral Array
items.description: Shattered array of cathedral-sized antenna spires tilted against a red giant, interior lit by emergency sodium.
items.flavor_text: The array stopped receiving. The reply finally arrived, by card, after the silence.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, shattered cathedral-sized antenna spires tilted against red giant with emergency sodium lighting, epic ruin

items.name: Derelict Bridge Wreck
items.description: Half-collapsed capital ship bridge with hull plating torn open to vacuum, torn cables drifting slowly.
items.flavor_text: The bridge lost its crew. Some of the crew stayed to watch.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, half-collapsed capital ship bridge torn open to vacuum with slowly drifting cables, grim epic

items.name: Crimson Nebula Foundry
items.description: Interior view of an operating nebula foundry — molten ore streams pouring into orbital casting frames with animated sparks.
items.flavor_text: Industry happening on a scale that discourages questions. The card is not afraid.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle board backdrop, nebula foundry interior with molten ore streams pouring into orbital casting frames and animated sparks, legendary industrial-cosmic

items.name: Combat Pulse
items.description: Driving electronic pulse loop at 128 bpm. Default combat mood, reliable and high-energy.
items.flavor_text: The pulse does not care who wins. Only that the deck keeps playing along.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, driving electronic pulse at 128 bpm, synth bass and hat layers, energetic and reliable

items.name: Void Ambient
items.description: Slow ambient drone bed with distant synth pads and soft low-frequency heartbeat. For thoughtful duels.
items.flavor_text: The track is listening. The card is listening. Somebody plays. Eventually.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, slow ambient drone bed with distant synth pads and low heartbeat, meditative spacious

items.name: Cold War
items.description: Minimal tense string line over a steady low drum. Slow build, never quite resolving.
items.flavor_text: Neither pilot moves first. The score does, politely, for both of them.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, minimal tense string line over steady low drum, slow build never resolving, cinematic tension

items.name: Heroic Charge
items.description: Bright brass charge motif with a driving snare gallop. Classic hero-cue energy, proudly unsubtle.
items.flavor_text: The brass section thinks this is the turning point. The brass section is often right.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, bright brass charge motif with driving snare gallop, classic hero cue, triumphant unsubtle

items.name: Dark Ambient
items.description: Dense black drone bed with detuned pads and rare rising metallic clang. For grim decks, mostly.
items.flavor_text: The drone carries whatever weight the pilot brought. Quietly, without comment.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, dense black drone bed with detuned pads and rare metallic clang, grim atmospheric

items.name: Industrial Combat
items.description: Heavy industrial beat with clanging machinery samples and distorted bass stabs. Mechanical aggression.
items.flavor_text: The beat was recorded in a real foundry. Nobody asked for permission afterward.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, heavy industrial beat with clanging machinery samples and distorted bass stabs, mechanical aggression

items.name: Synth Warfare
items.description: Fast analog-synth arpeggio over a half-time trap drum kit. Retro-future combat sprint.
items.flavor_text: The arpeggio is louder than the pilot's thoughts. The pilot thanks it politely.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, fast analog synth arpeggio over half-time trap drum kit, retro-future combat energy

items.name: Ethereal Battle
items.description: Wordless vocal chorals layered over soft percussion and distant chimes. Beauty in the middle of combat.
items.flavor_text: Somebody is singing while the pilot fights. They refuse to explain themselves.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, wordless vocal chorals over soft percussion and distant chimes, ethereal beautiful combat

items.name: Orchestral Battle
items.description: Full orchestra combat cue with strings, brass, choir swells, and big timpani runs. Feature-film grade.
items.flavor_text: A full orchestra for one duel. Nobody minds the overspend. The orchestra fed everybody.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music loop asset, full orchestra combat cue strings brass choir swells timpani runs, cinematic feature-film grade

items.name: Victory Symphony
items.description: Signature victory cue — full symphony swell with choir, harp flourish, and a bright horn-fanfare resolution.
items.flavor_text: Some wins earn a symphony. The symphony shows up only when deserved.
items.art_prompt_hints: battle music stinger asset, signature victory symphony with choir harp flourish and horn fanfare resolution, triumphant epic

items.name: Graceful Exit Defeat Screen
items.description: Defeat screen: ship tips wing, drifts off-frame, soft silver-grey caption appears with the opponent's name.
items.flavor_text: The ship leaves politely. The duel doesn't ask questions. Another one tomorrow.
items.art_prompt_hints: defeat screen composition, ship tipping wing drifting off frame with soft silver-grey caption, dignified quiet loss

items.name: Static Signal Defeat Screen
items.description: Defeat screen: frame collapses into analog static, horizontal scanline roll, monochrome defeat caption.
items.flavor_text: The signal breaks mid-thought. Comes back tomorrow, remembers most of it.
items.art_prompt_hints: defeat screen composition, frame collapsing into analog static with horizontal scanline roll and monochrome caption, glitchy retro

items.name: Fireworks Victory Screen
items.description: Victory screen: three synchronized orbital fireworks bloom with the ship silhouetted against them.
items.flavor_text: The fireworks were already loaded before the duel started. Optimism ships standard.
items.art_prompt_hints: victory screen composition, three synchronized orbital fireworks blooming with ship silhouetted against them, celebratory bright

items.name: Fade to Stars Victory Screen
items.description: Victory screen: foreground action fades slowly into a quiet starfield with a thin gold caption rising from below.
items.flavor_text: A victory that does not shout. The stars carry it forward, patiently, without fanfare.
items.art_prompt_hints: victory screen composition, foreground fading into quiet starfield with thin gold caption rising, contemplative understated

items.name: Self-Destruct Defeat Screen
items.description: Defeat screen: ship chooses self-destruct, frame flashes white, debris scatter and a dry mission-log caption.
items.flavor_text: The ship chose itself over the card. The pilot made the call.
items.art_prompt_hints: defeat screen composition, self-destruct frame flash white into debris scatter with dry mission-log caption, dramatic final

items.name: Warp Jump Victory Screen
items.description: Victory screen: the ship warps forward mid-frame with streaks and a crisp shockwave behind, leaving the opponent in static.
items.flavor_text: The ship left before the defeat screen could load. Style is a form of mercy.
items.art_prompt_hints: victory screen composition, ship warping forward mid-frame with streaks and crisp shockwave leaving opponent in static, rare and decisive

items.name: Hologram Trophy Victory Screen
items.description: Victory screen: an animated holographic trophy unfolds in midair with the pilot's callsign engraved and rotating slowly.
items.flavor_text: The trophy is not real. The pilot keeps it anyway. The shelf has made room.
items.art_prompt_hints: victory screen composition, animated holographic trophy unfolding in midair with engraved rotating callsign, epic prestige

items.name: Heroic Last Stand Defeat Screen
items.description: Defeat screen: an animated montage of the ship's final maneuvers, with a slow cinematic pan and grave caption card.
items.flavor_text: A defeat that feels like a speech. The montage takes its time.
items.art_prompt_hints: defeat screen composition, animated montage of final maneuvers with slow cinematic pan and grave caption card, legendary cinematic

items.name: Damage Numbers Classic White
items.description: Crisp white damage numerals in a clean sans-serif. Rises and fades on every hit. Default clarity.
items.flavor_text: White numbers. Unambiguous. The pilot prefers not to debate arithmetic mid-duel.
items.art_prompt_hints: damage number popup asset, crisp white sans-serif numerals rising and fading, clean high-contrast default

items.name: Damage Numbers Blood Red
items.description: Deep blood-red damage numerals with a faint black drop-shadow. Heavier weight, reads like a verdict.
items.flavor_text: Red numbers lose their subtlety. The opponent counted them anyway. Still counting.
items.art_prompt_hints: damage number popup asset, deep blood-red numerals with black drop shadow, heavy weight verdict-like, aggressive

items.name: Damage Numbers Neon Cyan
items.description: Neon-cyan damage numerals with soft outer glow and small trailing spark on rise.
items.flavor_text: Cyan for the accountants. They keep saying they love this job. They do.
items.art_prompt_hints: damage number popup asset, neon cyan numerals with soft outer glow and small trailing spark, arcade bright

items.name: Damage Numbers Gold Glitter
items.description: Gold damage numerals with small glitter particles shedding off the top edge on rise.
items.flavor_text: The numbers shed sparkles. Nobody feels guilty about celebrating their own hits.
items.art_prompt_hints: damage number popup asset, gold numerals with small glitter particles shedding off top edge, celebratory warm

items.name: Targeting Reticle Minimalist
items.description: Thin white cross reticle with four ticks and a soft center dot. Gets out of the way of the read.
items.flavor_text: A reticle that trusts the pilot to do the looking. Mutual respect, mostly.
items.art_prompt_hints: targeting reticle overlay, thin white cross with four ticks and soft center dot, minimalist quiet clarity

items.name: Targeting Reticle Military
items.description: Tactical crosshair with range markings, mil-dots, and a small heading readout beneath the center.
items.flavor_text: The reticle came with paperwork. The pilot filed it. The duel paid out anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: targeting reticle overlay, tactical crosshair with range markings mil-dots and small heading readout, military instrumented

items.name: Targeting Reticle Hologram
items.description: Projected holographic reticle with subtle parallax, shifting scan bands, and a soft inner ring pulse.
items.flavor_text: The reticle hums at the edge of hearing. The pilot listens, shoots at the feeling.
items.art_prompt_hints: targeting reticle overlay, projected holographic reticle with subtle parallax shifting scan bands and soft inner ring pulse, advanced sci-fi
